title: Raccoon
description: Add tameable (and chonkable) raccoon in the game.
body:
Those cute little creatures filled with sillyness are waiting for you to play with !



## Spawn

You can found raccoons in all forest biomes. If you're lucky, you even can encounter a chonky raccoon !

![A chonky raccoon with a medium sized raccoon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/196761a89a18c71bb94f43bf15fb2b8e2e66b3dc.png)

_Don't even try to attack them or they will get mad at you !!_



## Interactions

Both raccoon types are tameable with apples. You can also change the color of their bandana with dyes.

With wheats, stick and black stained glass panes, you can craft hat and glasses. By clicking on your raccoon, they will make it very stylish ! (Removable by sneaking)

Raccoons are very hungry (or they just really likes food), you can feed them with any food item, they will love it ! But be careful, don't feed them too much...

Also, they will try to steal inside your trash cans (if you have [Trash Cans](https://modrinth.com/mod/trash-cans) installed too) or in your composter ! However, they're gonna make you forget that by dancing near a jukebox !

By the way, do you know Pedro the raccoon ? Maybe you could encounter it...



## Raccoonmaninov

If you feel lonely at night, you can craft Raccoonmaninov by combining seven gray wools and two red wools. This raccoon plush with a cute red hood will keep you company !

![A plush next to a bed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afb3716243be1e144bd1b9fa16f7389e86fdd71b.png)
